decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study' exactly matches the existing registry record with the same record_id. The registry record already captures this project (same project_name, borough, and description of the Jamaica Bus Improvement Study as a joint NYCT/DOT study). The observation does not require linking to any different record; it already resolves to its own base_record_id. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Outgrowth of New York City Bus Rapid Transit study
Response to community concerns about bus movement in Jamaica CBD
